settingsLine: Waves.createSampler() shift · sine pool · drives Fraunces wght/SOFT/WONK/opsz · one ink · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: Stet: the proofreader's mark for 'let it stand'. p5.waves move: a shift sampler over a pinned sine pool drives the variable-font axes (wght/SOFT/WONK) of p5.js 2.x — so the word the system is told to leave alone is continuously rewritten as the wave formula reorganises. One ink, one gesture; the wave does everything.
curatorLine: Between Karel Martens and p5.wavesX100.

settingsLine: Waves.createSampler() ×2 · summed + thresholded · dual shift:all · full-bleed · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: Mis registration. p5.waves move: two createSampler() fields summed and thresholded — both shift:true over the full pool, so the inked continents lurch and tear out of register while two offset plates never line up.
curatorLine: Between Karel Martens and p5.wavesX100.

settingsLine: Waves.wave() · wave classic sine · range mapped · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: Tilts. p5.waves move: Range mapping — driving ROTATION angle, not position.
curatorLine: Between Sol LeWitt and p5.wavesX100.
pageTitle: Forty Nine Tilts — p5.waves promo frame

settingsLine: Waves.wave() · select by index · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: Thirty-four waves, named and drawn. The title is the work and the work is the title. The sketch contains nothing the statement doesn't cover: every wave in p5.waves.v3.3.0, selected by numeric index, one per row, labeled with the library's own name, drawn as a single line that travels with time. p5.waves move: Select by index. p5.waves ships 34 named waves addressable by integer (0 = classic sine, 33 = smooth solid sine).
curatorLine: Between Karel Martens Oefeningen and p5.wavesX100.
pageTitle: Thirty Four Waves — p5.waves promo frame

settingsLine: createSampler ×2 · wave round linked sine · threshold active · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: For a fixed wave field (round linked sine × round linked sine, seed 7, speed 1), sampled as a 14×14 additive grid, what does threshold *do* across its full operating range when swept continuously in time? p5.waves move: Threshold, treated as a SWEPT DIAL. the cutoff is applied manually to a two-sampler field; most demos pick one value and commit.
curatorLine: Between Bridget Riley and One Or Zero.

settingsLine: Waves.wave() · wave classic sine · wild mode · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: For a single wave ('classic sine') at fixed frequency, phase and seed, what is the continuous shape-spectrum when mode: 'wild' is held constant and unpredictability is swept from 0 to 1 in 25 equal steps? p5.waves move: Mode: 'wild' + unpredictability treated as a continuous axis rather than a single dial.
curatorLine: Between Vera Molnár and p5.wavesX100.
pageTitle: Tame To Wild — p5.waves promo frame

settingsLine: createSampler() · wave mountain peaks · frequency · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: Enumerate. Same instruction performed five times, exhaustively, by ascending parameter value. p5.waves move: Frequency parameter on Waves.createSampler().
curatorLine: Between Sol LeWitt and p5.wavesX100.

settingsLine: createSampler() · group gentle · shift on · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: Crossfade Window turns grouped wave families into a readable shifting campaign panel, with the sampler itself acting as the headline.
curatorLine: A library-first motion plate where the transition is the headline.

settingsLine: Waves.wave() · waves sine × square · morph · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: What does a single wave-morph wave: ['sine','square'] look like when mix is NOT a sweeping gradient but a FROZEN STEPPED LADDER across the picture plane — seven vertical cells locked at mix = {0, 1/6, 2/6, 3/6, 4/6, 5/6, 1} — with time only driving phase (not mix), so the viewer reads the morph as a stable taxonomy strip that breathes in place? p5.waves move: Morph Via Mix. wave: ['sine','square'] with a hard-locked per-cell mix value.
curatorLine: Between Josef Albers, "Interaction Of Color" Stepped-gradient Plates + Karel Martens Oefeningen and p5.wavesX100 + Yesterday's Five Windows.

settingsLine: Waves.wave() · wave round linked sine · custom domain · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: What does one wave ('round linked sine') look like when five stacked horizontal lines each sample it through a different input domain — row 1 spans ±π (one period), row 5 spans ±8π (eight periods) — with a shared time phase that drifts slowly? p5.waves move: Custom input domain via map() remapping. x on the canvas is mapped to u ∈ [-N·π, N·π] before being passed to Waves.wave(u, …).
curatorLine: Between Bridget Riley and p5.wavesX100.

settingsLine: Waves.wave() · wave round linked sine · shift on · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: What does 'round linked sine' look like when range: [4, 32] drives the RADIUS — not the y-position — of a 10x10 circle grid sampled at s = col * 0.42 + row * 0.17, with slow continuous time drift, rendered alongside a margin-preview strip that draws the same wave curve between the same [4, 32] clamp markers? p5.waves move: Range: [min, max].
curatorLine: Between Vera Molnár and p5.wavesX100.
pageTitle: Range To Radius — p5.waves promo frame

settingsLine: createSampler() · group gentle · shift on · WEBGL · source 1080×1080 WEBGL · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: When a single p5.waves sampler with shift: true drives a 7×7×7 = 343-cube field — each cube held in place at its lattice position, but rotated on all three local axes by an independent sampler read (rx from i, ry from j, rz from k) — what does the shared wave-family mutation look like? p5.waves move: Shift on a sampler, constrained with group: 'gentle'.
curatorLine: Between Manfred Mohr and p5.wavesX100.

settingsLine: Waves.wave() · wave mountain peaks · wild mode · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: Double. Same formula, rendered in two states, printed side by side so the difference IS the piece. p5.waves move: Mode: 'wild' + unpredictability.
curatorLine: Between Lawrence Weiner and p5.wavesX100.
pageTitle: Stable And Wild — p5.waves promo frame

settingsLine: Waves.wave() · wave wobble sine · tick time · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: Slide. Time advances; every cell's frozen moment advances with it. p5.waves move: Tick-time mode / seconds parameter.
curatorLine: Between Hanne Darboven and p5.wavesX100.
pageTitle: Sixty Four Moments — p5.waves promo frame

settingsLine: createSampler ×2 · waves batman / triangle / round linked sine · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
stageLine: batman / triangle / round linked sine · grid
deck: Rehearse — two programs on one card, running forever out of phase. p5.waves move: Two parallel two-sampler fields with different wave pairs, sampled at offset times, drawn at a fixed cutoff.
curatorLine: Between Grilli Type Specimen Crossed With A Risograph Misregister and p5.wavesX100.

settingsLine: Waves.wave() · select by index · source 1080×1080 · native 1080×1080 · p5.waves v3.3.0
deck: Break. p5.waves move: Select by index (Waves.wave(y, {wave: i})) + range mapping.
curatorLine: Between Grilli Type Specimens and p5.wavesX100.

curatorLine: A library-first motion plate where the transition is the headline.
